name: Meta Ads ROAS (return on ad spend)
definition_short: When your goal is revenue, ROAS is the metric you should watch like a hawk. It shows how much money you earn for every dollar spent on your ads. For example, a ROAS of “3” means you make $3 for every $1 spent.
formula_readable: ROAS = revenue generated from ads / ad spend
aliases: Facebook Ads ROAS (return on ad spend)
Meta Ads ROAS (return on ad spend)
gotchas: Formula shown for transparency and may follow source-specific reporting definitions.
